config.resources: usable (real fetch via custom ResourceLoader; no substitution)

prompt_named_verb_result.verb_from_prompt: render mathematical equations from LaTeX input
prompt_named_verb_result.scenario: Open output/final/index.html under production fidelity; type 'x^2' into the input region; observe the output region
prompt_named_verb_result.expected_result: A typeset visual representation of x squared appears in the output region (specifically: a .katex element with the rendered glyphs as descendants, error region hidden)
prompt_named_verb_result.detail: output region contains .katex element after a single 'input' event; rendered DOM text is 'x2x^2x2' (KaTeX's HTML+MathML composite); error region remains hidden

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: Type 'x^2' into the textarea, observe output region
artifact_exercise_results.details: live render produced .katex DOM under file:// load with locally-bundled KaTeX; no error surfaced

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: Type 'a+b' into the textarea, observe live preview without button press
artifact_exercise_results.details: live preview confirmed under production-fidelity exercise (file:// load, real KaTeX from local bundle)

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: Type invalid LaTeX (\frac{1}{), observe error region
artifact_exercise_results.details: error region visible with text 'KaTeX parse error: Unexpected end of input in a macro argument, expected }' at end of input: \frac{1}{', under production-fidelity exercise

summary: Integrated artifact at output/final/ now satisfies the prompt's named verb under production-fidelity exercise. KaTeX is bundled into output/final/vendor/katex/ (katex.min.js + katex.min.css + 16 woff2 font files; ~530 KB total). index.html script and link tags reference the local bundle. No CDN dependency at runtime. v1.5 production-fidelity environment verified PNV.1 + S3.A1 + S3.A2 against the live wired modules with zero runtime dependency substitution, as evidenced by the fetch log. Prior v1.4 verdict ('pass') is reclassified to 'fail' on the original report.json; this report-v15.json is the authoritative verdict under v1.5.
v15_amendment_notes: Per v1.5 (architecture/role_charters.md, Convergence Verifier charter §Production-fidelity exercise + §Prompt-named-verb pass): the cv_artifact_exercise pass may no longer run in a 'Node sandbox with stubbed DOM' that substitutes runtime dependencies. The prompt_named_verb_assertion is non-skippable and admits no pass_with_concerns. Both gates passed cleanly here.
